name: Other party info
instructions: Best-effort capture of the other driver's info: 'other_party_name', 'other_party_insurer', 'other_party_contact' (phone or email). Skip any the caller doesn't have — many callers won't have exchanged details, and that's fine. Don't push. Move on as soon as they've shared what they can.

condition.expression: Caller has shared what other-party info they have, or said they don't have any.
